caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio against a dark, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Humble". Positioned directly in front of him is a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm, which is labeled "sE Electronics V7". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing while he maintains a steady gaze forward and slightly to the side. His right arm is visible, showing tattoos on his forearm. The setting remains static throughout the clip, with the only movement being the man's facial expressions and lip movements as he talks into the microphone.
